Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('MONITORACONTRATOPREVISAOCLIENTE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &AnoBase.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &SerItmRecPag = nullvalue(&SerItmRecPag) &SerItmSts = nullvalue(&SerItmSts) &SerItmTip = nullvalue(&SerItmTip) &SerItmTipPlan = nullvalue(&SerItmTipPlan) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'CONTRATO / PREVISÕES' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount SerItmTip.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' SerItmSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' If (SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo and ((SerItmTip = TipoLancamentoServico.PREVISAO) or (SerItmUltVct.IsEmpty() or SerItmUltVct.IsNull()))) &Update.Link = NovoContratoPrevisao.Link('UPD', EmpCod, SerItmCod) &Update.Class = !'Attribute' Else &Update.Link = "" &Update.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &Display = !'' &Display.Link = NovoContratoPrevisao.Link('DIS', EmpCod, SerItmCod) &GerarMensalidades.Clear() &GerarMensalidades.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (1=2) &GerarMensalidades.AddItem(1, 'Log.Alteração') Endif If (SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO and SerItmUltVct.IsEmpty()) &GerarMensalidades.AddItem(2, 'Gerar Duplicatas') Endif If (not SerItmUltVct.IsEmpty()) &GerarMensalidades.AddItem(3, 'Visualizar Duplicatas') Endif If (SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Inativo) &GerarMensalidades.AddItem(4, 'Reativar') Endif If (SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo) &GerarMensalidades.AddItem(5, 'Inativar ') Endif If (1=2) &GerarMensalidades.AddItem(6, 'Alterar Valor') Endif If (1=2 and (SerItmDtaFim.IsEmpty() or SerItmDtaFim.IsNull()) and SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo) &GerarMensalidades.AddItem(7, 'Prog. Término') Endif If &GerarMensalidades.Count = 1 &GerarMensalidades.Class = !'Invisible' Else &GerarMensalidades.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf IF SerCliNom.isempty() or SerCliNom.isnull() &SerCliNov = SerCliCodRaz else &SerCliNov = trim(str(SerCliCod)) +' - '+' [' + trim(SerCliNom) + ']' EndIf Do Case Case SerItmTip = TipoLancamentoServico.CONTRATO SerItmTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case SerItmTip = TipoLancamentoServico.PREVISAO SerItmTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case SerItmTip = TipoLancamentoServico.VENDA SerItmTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Otherwise SerItmTip.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase Do Case Case SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO SerItmSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO SerItmSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise SerItmSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &GerarMensalidades.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &GerarMensalidades = 1 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' Case &GerarMensalidades = 2 Do 'Do GerarDuplicatas' Case &GerarMensalidades = 3 Do 'Do VisualizarDuplicatas' Case &GerarMensalidades = 4 Do 'Do Reativar' Case &GerarMensalidades = 5 Do 'Do Inativar' Case &GerarMensalidades = 6 Do 'Do AlterarValor' Case &GerarMensalidades = 7 Do 'Do GravarDtaFim' EndCase &GerarMensalidades = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Reativar.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Reativar.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action Reativar' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AlterarValor.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AlterarValor.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action AlterarValor' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ NovoContratoPrevisao.Call('INS', &EmpCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportMonitoraContratoPrevisaoCliente.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersSerItmDtaFim1.Visible = False &SerItmAbv1.Visible = False &SerItmDiaVct1.Visible = False &SerCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersSerItmDtaFim1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMABV' &SerItmAbv1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMDIAVCT' &SerItmDiaVct1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERCOD' &SerCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersSerItmDtaFim2.Visible = False &SerItmAbv2.Visible = False &SerItmDiaVct2.Visible = False &SerCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersSerItmDtaFim2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERITMABV' &SerItmAbv2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERITMDIAVCT' &SerItmDiaVct2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERCOD' &SerCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersSerItmDtaFim3.Visible = False &SerItmAbv3.Visible = False &SerItmDiaVct3.Visible = False &SerCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersSerItmDtaFim3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERITMABV' &SerItmAbv3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERITMDIAVCT' &SerItmDiaVct3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERCOD' &SerCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' &SerItmDtaFim2.SetEmpty() &SerItmDtaFim_To2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' &SerItmDtaFim3.SetEmpty() &SerItmDtaFim_To3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do GerarDuplicatas' Do case case SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO msg('NÃO é permitido gerar duplicatas para Contratos/Previsões INATIVOS!') case SerFilCod <> &FilCod msg('Só será possível gerar as duplicatas deste ' + SerItmTip.ToFormattedString() + ' acessando a filial: ' + SerFilCod.ToFormattedString()) otherwise GravaDuplicatasTemporariasContratoPrevisao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PesCod, SerItmCod, SerItmDtaInicio.Month()) ConfirmaDuplicatasContratoPrevisao.Call(SerItmCod) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do VisualizarDuplicatas' If not SerItmUltVct.IsEmpty() // GravaDuplicatasTemporariasContratoPrevisao_Existentes.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PesCod, SerItmCod) VisualizarDuplicatasContratoPrevisao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, SerItmCod) Else msg('Este Serviço/Plano não tem nenhuma duplicata gerada.') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Reativar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &SerItmCod_Selected = SerItmCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Reativar.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action Reativar' InativarPlanoServico.Call(EmpCod, SerItmCod, Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO) //vai ativar Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Inativar' WpInativarServicoCliente.Popup(EmpCod, &FilCod, SerItmCod, SerItmTip) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarValor' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &SerItmCod_Selected = SerItmCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AlterarValor.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action AlterarValor' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do GravarDtaFim' &NewDataFinal.SetEmpty() // WpAlteraData.Popup('A', &NewDataFinal) //A = inserir data fim ServicoCliente // if not &NewDataFinal.IsEmpty() // GravaDataFimServicoCliente.Call(EmpCod, SerItmCod, &NewDataFinal) // Refresh // else // msg('Erro! não foi possível programar o término deste contrato/previsão.') // EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpAlteraData.PopUp('A', &NewDataFinal) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if not &NewDataFinal.IsEmpty() GravaDataFimServicoCliente.Call(EmpCod, SerItmCod, &NewDataFinal) Refresh EndIf EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMCOD" &SerItmCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTERFULLTEXT" &FilterFullText.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMRECPAG" &SerItmRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMSTS" &SerItmSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMTIP" &SerItmTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMTIPPLAN" &SerItmTipPlan.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMDTAINICIO" &SerItmDtaInicio.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &SerItmDtaInicio_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' &SerItmDtaFim1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &SerItmDtaFim_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMABV' &SerItmAbv1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMDIAVCT' &SerItmDiaVct1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERCOD' &SerCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMCOD", "", not &SerItmCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerItmCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTERFULLTEXT", "", not &FilterFullText.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilterFullText, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMRECPAG", "", not &SerItmRecPag.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerItmRecPag, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMSTS", "", not &SerItmSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerItmSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMTIP", "", not &SerItmTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerItmTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMTIPPLAN", "", not &SerItmTipPlan.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerItmTipPlan, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMDTAINICIO", "", not (&SerItmDtaInicio.IsEmpty() AND &SerItmDtaInicio_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &SerItmDtaInicio.ToString().Trim(), &SerItmDtaInicio_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' AND not (&SerItmDtaFim1.IsEmpty() AND &SerItmDtaFim_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmDtaFim1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &SerItmDtaFim_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMABV' AND not &SerItmAbv1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmAbv1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERITMDIAVCT' AND not &SerItmDiaVct1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmDiaVct1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SERCOD' AND not &SerCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' AND not (&SerItmDtaFim2.IsEmpty() AND &SerItmDtaFim_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmDtaFim2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &SerItmDtaFim_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERITMABV' AND not &SerItmAbv2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmAbv2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERITMDIAVCT' AND not &SerItmDiaVct2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmDiaVct2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SERCOD' AND not &SerCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERITMDTAFIM' AND not (&SerItmDtaFim3.IsEmpty() AND &SerItmDtaFim_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmDtaFim3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &SerItmDtaFim_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERITMABV' AND not &SerItmAbv3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmAbv3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERITMDIAVCT' AND not &SerItmDiaVct3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerItmDiaVct3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SERCOD' AND not &SerCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SerCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"ServicoCliente" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoPrevisaoAgendador' GeraPrevisaoAutomatico_Agendador.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PesCod) Refresh EndEvent Event &Update.Click NovoContratoPrevisao.Call('UPD', EmpCod, SerItmCod) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
